title: ChestShop (Fabric)
description: A simple mod that adds chest powered shops.
body: # ChestShop for Fabric A simple mod that adds chest powered shops. **ChestShop requires [Economy Fabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-economy)** & Fabric API. ## Sign format: Line 1: Player Name Line 2: Amount of item Line 3: Price, buy price after the B and sell price after the S. If you have both B and S you seperate with : Line 4: Item name. must be the name that comes after `minecraft:` ## Known Bugs: - ~~TNT blows up locked chests/signs~~ Fixed in v1.2 - Hoppers can still take out items of chestshops - ~~No admin shops, only player shops at the moment.~~ initial support in v1.2
